unusedCode.issue: Import 'java.util.UUID' is imported but never used
Method marked @Deprecated but still used. Logic duplicated in ensureLib(). Can be removed entirely.
unusedCode.recommendation: Delete deprecated method and update all references

unusedCode.issue: @FunctionalInterface declared in Downloader.java but only used internally. Not exposed or used elsewhere.
unusedCode.recommendation: Consider making it private or removing if truly unused

unusedCode.issue: Multiple imports from java.awt and java.io not used comprehensively across all methods
Method runCommand() defined but never called. Logic is dead code.

duplication.issue: Download logic appears 3 different ways - duplicated byte buffer management and stream handling
duplication.example: byte[] buffer = new byte[8192] appears in multiple places with identical loop structure
duplication.recommendation: Create unified DownloadHelper class with single implementation

duplication.issue: Multiple implementations of 'needsUpdate()' logic checking file existence, size, and hash
Both handle JSON read/write with Gson. Gson instance created separately in each class.
duplication.recommendation: Extract common ConfigBase class or utility for JSON operations

duplication.issue: Java version detection and path resolution duplicated across 3 classes
System.getProperty('os.name') parsed multiple times with duplicate logic
duplication.recommendation: Use OSHelper methods consistently instead of inline checks

duplication.issue: ZIP file extraction logic duplicated for natives and assets
Similar speed calculation and progress message formatting repeated
Identical try-catch-print pattern: System.err.println('[ClassName] Error: ' + e.getMessage())
duplication.recommendation: Create LoggerHelper facade or use proper logging framework

potentialBugs.issue: No null check before iterating: data.libraries.forEach(). If data is null or data.libraries is null, NPE occurs.
potentialBugs.code: if (data.libraries == null) return; // Check exists but returns silently - caller doesn't know
potentialBugs.recommendation: Return meaningful error or throw exception so caller knows installation failed

potentialBugs.issue: No null check: 'JsonObject packageInfo = releases.get(0).getAsJsonObject().get(...)',releases could be empty
No null check: File[] files = cacheDir.listFiles(); listFiles() can return null
potentialBugs.code: for (File file : cacheDir.listFiles()) // NPE if listFiles() returns null

potentialBugs.issue: BufferedInputStream and FileOutputStream created with 'new' but can throw exception before assignment to try-with-resources
potentialBugs.recommendation: Move stream creation inside try() block

potentialBugs.issue: HttpURLConnection not explicitly closed if exception occurs
potentialBugs.recommendation: Use try-with-resources or explicitly close connection in finally block

potentialBugs.code: try (Reader reader = new FileReader(jsonFile)) { data = gson.fromJson(reader, VersionData.class); }
potentialBugs.issue: Properly closed but pattern repeated. Some usages might miss try-with-resources.
potentialBugs.recommendation: Audit all FileReader/FileInputStream usage for consistency

potentialBugs.issue: totalBytesDownloaded field modified from multiple threads without synchronization
potentialBugs.code: totalBytesDownloaded += read; // In executor thread without synchronization

potentialBugs.issue: Singleton pattern with synchronized block, but field is not volatile
potentialBugs.recommendation: Add volatile keyword to instance field

potentialBugs.issue: Multiple volatile fields modified/read from different threads without proper synchronization
process.getInputStream() not null checked, also process.waitFor() can be interrupted
potentialBugs.recommendation: Add null check and handle InterruptedException properly

potentialBugs.issue: No validation of icon path - user can potentially specify ../../../etc/passwd
potentialBugs.recommendation: Validate that icon path is within icons directory

potentialBugs.issue: Silently falls back to 'java' if custom Java not found - user doesn't know system Java will be used
potentialBugs.recommendation: Log warning and notify user through UI

potentialBugs.issue: while (isPaused && !shouldStop) with sleep(100) - if shouldStop becomes true mid-pause, thread might deadlock

architectureIssues.issue: Class has 400+ lines handling too many concerns: downloading, extracting, progress tracking, pause/resume, native handling
architectureIssues.recommendation: Split into: GameDownloader, LibraryExtractor, ProgressReporter, PauseManager

architectureIssues.issue: 335 lines handling too many concerns: Java setup, classpath building, natives extraction, game launching
architectureIssues.recommendation: Split into: JavaRuntimeSetup, ClasspathBuilder, NativesManager, GameProcess

architectureIssues.issue: Handles game setup AND Java runtime setup AND native extraction - violates Single Responsibility
architectureIssues.recommendation: Extract JavaRuntimeManager and NativesExtractor into separate classes

architectureIssues.issue: GameLauncher uses VanillaManager, VanillaManager uses GameInstaller, GameInstaller could need GameLauncher info
architectureIssues.recommendation: Introduce dependency injection or facade pattern

architectureIssues.issue: UI classes (LauncherUI, InstanceView) directly instantiate core classes (GameLauncher, FabricManager)
architectureIssues.recommendation: Use factory pattern or dependency injection container

architectureIssues.issue: Static getInstance() pattern prevents testing and creates global state
architectureIssues.recommendation: Use dependency injection instead of singletons

architectureIssues.issue: Two separate mod API implementations with no common interface - violates DRY
architectureIssues.recommendation: Create ModProvider interface and make both inherit from it

architectureIssues.issue: 290+ lines: handles layout, game grid, recent games, icon loading, game launching
Implements ProgressListener but also extends Task - mixing concerns of download task and UI reporting
Massive data class with 30+ inner classes - should be split into separate model files per domain
architectureIssues.recommendation: Create separate model files: ManifestModel.java, LibraryModel.java, AssetModel.java

architectureIssues.issue: Some classes use Gson directly, others use helper methods - no consistent serialization strategy
architectureIssues.recommendation: Create JsonSerializer interface with implementations for each model type

performanceProblems.issue: gameProcess.waitFor() called in background task but not in separate thread - blocks UI
performanceProblems.recommendation: Run in separate thread or use ProcessHandle to avoid blocking

performanceProblems.issue: Using + operator for strings in loops (e.g., 'hexString.append(hex)' is good, but 'url + (repo.endsWith(...) ? ... : ...)')
performanceProblems.recommendation: Use StringBuilder for concatenations in loops

performanceProblems.issue: For each asset, checking file existence and calculating hash individually - could batch operations
performanceProblems.recommendation: Pre-calculate all hashes and check all files in single pass

performanceProblems.issue: Reading entire file into ByteArrayOutputStream before writing - wastes memory for large files
performanceProblems.recommendation: Use direct streaming instead of buffering

performanceProblems.issue: Fixed thread pool of 10 threads regardless of system capabilities
Prints 50+ log lines with detailed file listings - major I/O in critical path
performanceProblems.recommendation: Move diagnostic logging to debug level, print summary only in info

performanceProblems.issue: Lists directory content multiple times per refresh - could cache
performanceProblems.recommendation: Cache directory listing and invalidate only on known changes

performanceProblems.issue: Would compile regex if called in loop (currently called per library)
performanceProblems.recommendation: Pre-compile regex pattern as static final

performanceProblems.issue: TextArea keeps growing with log entries - no cleanup or size limit
performanceProblems.recommendation: Implement circular buffer with max size limit

performanceProblems.issue: Adds listener that updates UI on every single progress update - could batch updates
performanceProblems.recommendation: Use throttling to update UI at most every 100ms

loggingIssues.issue: 100+ instances of System.out.println() and System.err.println() - no proper logging framework
loggingIssues.recommendation: Replace with SLF4J or java.util.logging - configure appenders for file/console

loggingIssues.issue: Each class uses different format: '[ClassName]', '[ModName]', no timestamps, no log levels
loggingIssues.recommendation: Use structured logging with proper logger configuration

loggingIssues.issue: downloadLibraries() silently fails if installer encounters error - user doesn't see it
loggingIssues.recommendation: Log all errors and propagate them to UI layer

loggingIssues.issue: Lines 179-293: Prints every JAR file, every environment variable, detailed lib listings
loggingIssues.recommendation: Keep only critical info in INFO level, move details to DEBUG

loggingIssues.issue: Exceptions caught and silently ignored - silently fails with no user feedback
loggingIssues.recommendation: Log exception stack traces, show error dialogs to user

loggingIssues.issue: Uses emojis in logs (🔍, ✓, ✗, etc.) - not machine-readable, breaks log parsing
Returns empty list on error without logging what went wrong
loggingIssues.recommendation: Log error and return error wrapper or throw exception
Use proper error logging to file

mainProblems: No proper logging framework - 100+ System.out.println() calls
Multiple God Objects with 300+ lines handling diverse concerns
Potential NPE and resource leaks in critical paths
Tight coupling between UI and core logic
Thread safety issues in concurrent operations
No dependency injection - hard to test

priorityFixes.title: Add logging framework (SLF4J/Log4j)
priorityFixes.description: Replace all System.out/err with proper logging

priorityFixes.title: Refactor God Objects
priorityFixes.description: Split GameInstaller, GameLauncher into focused classes

priorityFixes.title: Fix NPE risks and resource leaks
priorityFixes.description: Add null checks and proper resource management

priorityFixes.title: Add unit tests and introduce DI
